description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, mandarin collar with a buttoned chest placket, pintucks on the mid neck and bust region that has stitch detailingFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this colourful print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose white or teal blue kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
